default_value: repo root derived from script location
description: Repo root to inventory and validate.
effect_summary: Selects the tracked-file inventory and current-surface coverage scope.

description: Directory containing editable JSONL contract files.
Schema file to apply before inserting contract rows.
Optional JSONL path for append-only planned-run records.
effect_summary: Adds an audit output for selected and skipped scheduler decisions without executing workspace work.

description: Identifier for one selector planning pass.
effect_summary: Stamps all planned-run records from the same selection pass with a shared planner identifier.

description: Optional timestamp override for planned-run records.
effect_summary: Allows deterministic replay or tests while preserving explicit planning time metadata.

description: Maximum runner attempts recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Changes planned-run budget metadata only; the selector still does not execute work.

description: Optional maximum wall-clock runtime seconds recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Changes planned-run budget metadata only; the selector still does not execute work.

description: Optional output file path for the serialized export.
effect_summary: Redirects serializer output from stdout to a file.

description: Optional maximum number of works to export.
effect_summary: Narrows export output for smoke tests or small handoff slices.

description: Emit a machine-readable loss report for the selected format instead of serialized records.
effect_summary: Reports exported, transformed, dropped, review-required, and skipped fields/records for the selected format.

description: Emit a human-readable per-record explanation of fields the selected format will drop.
effect_summary: Changes output from serialized records to manifest-driven loss explanation text.
Narrows per-record loss explanation output to one record.

description: Optional work_key_v1/work_id selector for exporting one durable work bundle.
effect_summary: Narrows serializer output to one canonical work record and its loaded durable bundle.
